---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

<!--
# Fig 1i/k/l - Frequency of somatic actin waves + axonal/neurite growth in
# unpolarized cortical slice neurons (DIV-0, E15.5).

## What this file does

Body has 3 analytical sections producing distinct outputs:

1. **Wave count** (lines 76-145): reads per-cell wave-count CSVs;
   plots wave_count.pdf with optional t-test. **→ Fig 1i** (line 84
   of docx: "Frequency of somatic actin waves in unpolarized neurons
   of E15.5 cortical slice. N = 26 neurons from 3 experiments.").
2. **Axonal growth** (lines 152-230): reads axonal growth CSVs +
   t-test. Feeds Fig 1k (extension and retraction duration of axon
   and minor neurites in E15.5 cortical slice culture. N = 28
   unpolarized neurons and 20 axons from 3 experiments.
   Kruskal-Wallis test).
3. **Neurite growth** (lines 239+): same for non-axon neurites.
   Feeds Fig 1l (extension and retraction velocities of axon and
   minor neurites).

## Manuscript panel

ED Fig 1g is "Period of neurite growth oscillation determined by Lomb-Scargle
periodogram analysis" (line 299 of docx). The Lomb-Scargle code for ED Fig 1g
is on a separate hard drive and will be copied in later — NOT in this file.
This file does wave **count**, not period.

Source Data sheet: ``Fig 1i``.

## Original G:\ source

G:/Figure 1_coordination/Fig. 1h/Lifeact_2min/wave_count.Rmd
-->

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE}
library(pracma)
library(peakPick)
library(quantmod)
library(ggpmisc)
library(tidyverse)
library(magrittr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggfortify)
library(ggpubr)
library(forecast)
library(tsibble)
library(broom)
library(tidyquant)
library(tsbox)
library("pheatmap")
library("RColorBrewer")
library(ggpmisc)
library(ggfortify)
library(viridis) # Default Color Maps from 'matplotlib' 
library(hrbrthemes)
library(data.table)
library(superheat)
library(ggpubr)
```

## load existing/saved environment (.RData)
```{r}
Path_1 <- dirname(rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path)
setwd(Path_1)
saved_path <- paste(Path_1, "wave.RData",  sep = "/")
load(file=saved_path)
Path_1 <- dirname(rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path)
```

# save environment (.RData)
```{r}
Path_1 <- dirname(rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path)
saved_path <- paste(Path_1, "wave.RData",  sep = "/")
save.image(file=saved_path)
```

# read data of wave count
```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(readr)  # For faster CSV reading
library(dplyr)  # For easy data manipulation (optional)

# Function to import all CSVs from a folder and its subfolders
import_csv_files <- function(directory) {
  # Get list of all CSV files in the folder and subfolders
  csv_files <- list.files(directory, pattern = "wave.*\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE, recursive = TRUE)
  
  # Read each file into a list of data frames
  data_list <- lapply(csv_files, read_csv)
  
  # Name the list elements with the corresponding file names (without the full path)
  names(data_list) <- dirname(csv_files) %>% basename()
  
  return(data_list)
}

# Set the parent directory containing CSV files
parent_directory <- Path_1 

# Import all CSV files
csv_wave_list <- import_csv_files(parent_directory)
```

```{r}
data_wave <- bind_rows(csv_wave_list, .id = "exp")%>% as.data.table()

data_wave$cell <- data_wave$Label %>% str_remove("\\.tif:.*")

df_summary <- data_wave %>% group_by(cell) %>% rstatix::get_summary_stats(Slice)

df_summary$wave_hour <- df_summary$n/((df_summary$max - df_summary$min + 1)*2) * 60

mean(df_summary$wave_hour)
```

```{r message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=8}
library(colorspace)
df_summary  %>% 
ggplot(aes(x=variable, y=wave_hour, fill = variable)) +
  #geom_point()
  theme_classic()+
  geom_violin(trim=FALSE, kernel ="gaussian", adjust=1)+
  geom_boxplot(width=0.4, fill="white",color="black",alpha=1, outliers = F) +
  geom_jitter(alpha=1, width=0.1) + 
 # scale_color_continuous_sequential(palette = "Heat", begin = 0.3, end = 1)+ 
 # scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(0, 1.5), breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 10))+ 
 # stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons, test = "t.test", paired=F)+
  theme_ipsum(grid = F, ticks = T) +
 theme_linedraw()+
   theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
        plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "right",
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold")) #for centering the text 

#plotly::ggplotly(p)
```

```{r}
ggsave(
  "wave_count.pdf",
  plot = last_plot(),
  device = "pdf")
#dev.off()
```

```{r}
Path_1 <- dirname(rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path)
saved_path <- paste(Path_1, "wave.RData",  sep = "/")
save.image(file=saved_path)
```

# read data of axonal growth
```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(readr)  # For faster CSV reading
library(dplyr)  # For easy data manipulation (optional)

# Function to import all CSVs from a folder and its subfolders
import_csv_files <- function(directory) {
  # Get list of all CSV files in the folder and subfolders
  csv_files <- list.files(directory, pattern = "AxonKymo.*\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE, recursive = TRUE)
  
  # Read each file into a list of data frames
  data_list <- lapply(csv_files, read_csv)
  
  # Name the list elements with the corresponding file names (without the full path)
  names(data_list) <- dirname(csv_files) %>% basename()
  
  return(data_list)
}

# Set the parent directory containing CSV files
parent_directory <- Path_1 

# Import all CSV files
csv_AxonKymo_list <- import_csv_files(parent_directory)
```

```{r}
data_AxonKymo <- bind_rows(csv_AxonKymo_list, .id = "exp")%>% as.data.table()

data_AxonKymo$exp <- data_AxonKymo$Label %>% str_extract("(?<=Kymo_).*?(?=\\.tif_)")
data_AxonKymo$axon <- data_AxonKymo$Label %>% str_extract("(?<=Kymo_).*?(?=\\.tif:)")

data_AxonKymo$distance <- data_AxonKymo$Width * 0.4324302
data_AxonKymo$time <-  data_AxonKymo$Height * 2
data_AxonKymo$rate <- data_AxonKymo$distance/data_AxonKymo$time

data_AxonKymo$direction<- "extension"
data_AxonKymo[Angle < -90]$direction <- "retraction"
```

```{r}
outliers <- data_AxonKymo %>% 
  group_by(direction) %>% 
 rstatix::identify_outliers(time) 

data_AxonKymo <- data_AxonKymo [! (Label %in% outliers$Label) ]

outliers <- data_AxonKymo %>% 
  group_by(direction) %>% 
 rstatix::identify_outliers(rate) 

data_AxonKymo <- data_AxonKymo [! (Label %in% outliers$Label) ]

```

```{r}
df_summary_AxonKymo <- data_AxonKymo %>% group_by(axon, direction) %>% rstatix::get_summary_stats(rate)
df_summary_AxonKymo$axon_neurite <- "axon"
```

```{r message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=8}
my_comparisons <- list(c("extension", "retraction"))

library(colorspace)
df_summary_AxonKymo %>% 
ggplot(aes(x=direction, y=mean, fill = direction)) +
  #geom_point()
  theme_classic()+
  geom_violin(trim=FALSE, kernel ="gaussian", adjust=1)+
  geom_boxplot(width=0.2, fill="white",color="black",alpha=1, outliers = F) +
  geom_jitter(alpha=1, width=0.05) + 
 # scale_color_continuous_sequential(palette = "Heat", begin = 0.3, end = 1)+ 
 scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), 
                   #limits = c(0, 250), 
                    breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 5))+ 
 stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons, test = "t.test", paired=F)+
  theme_ipsum(grid = F, ticks = T) +
 theme_linedraw()+
   theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
        plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "right",
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold")) #for centering the text 

#plotly::ggplotly(p)
```
# read data of neurite growth
```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(readr)  # For faster CSV reading
library(dplyr)  # For easy data manipulation (optional)

# Function to import all CSVs from a folder and its subfolders
import_csv_files <- function(directory) {
  # Get list of all CSV files in the folder and subfolders
  csv_files <- list.files(directory, pattern = "NeuriteKymo.*\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE, recursive = TRUE)
  
  # Read each file into a list of data frames
  data_list <- lapply(csv_files, read_csv)
  
  # Name the list elements with the corresponding file names (without the full path)
  names(data_list) <- dirname(csv_files) %>% basename()
  
  return(data_list)
}

# Set the parent directory containing CSV files
parent_directory <- Path_1 

# Import all CSV files
csv_NeuriteKymo_list <- import_csv_files(parent_directory)
```

```{r}
data_NeuriteKymo <- bind_rows(csv_NeuriteKymo_list, .id = "exp")%>% as.data.table()

data_NeuriteKymo$Cell <- data_NeuriteKymo$Label %>% str_extract("(?<=Kymo_).*?(?=\\.tif_)")
data_NeuriteKymo$Neurite <- data_NeuriteKymo$Label %>% str_extract("(?<=Kymo_).*?(?=\\.tif:)")

data_NeuriteKymo$distance <- data_NeuriteKymo$Width * 0.4324302
data_NeuriteKymo$time <-  data_NeuriteKymo$Height * 2
data_NeuriteKymo$rate <- data_NeuriteKymo$distance/data_NeuriteKymo$time

data_NeuriteKymo$direction<- "extension"
data_NeuriteKymo[Angle < -90]$direction <- "retraction"
```

```{r}
outliers <- data_NeuriteKymo %>% 
  group_by(direction, Cell) %>% 
 rstatix::identify_outliers(rate) 

data_NeuriteKymo_2 <- data_NeuriteKymo [! (Label %in% outliers$Label) ]

outliers <- data_NeuriteKymo_2 %>% 
  group_by(direction, Cell) %>% 
 rstatix::identify_outliers(time) 

data_NeuriteKymo_2 <- data_NeuriteKymo_2 [! (Label %in% outliers$Label) ]

```

```{r}
df_summary_NeuriteKymo <- data_NeuriteKymo %>% group_by(Cell, direction) %>% rstatix::get_summary_stats(rate)
df_summary_NeuriteKymo$axon_neurite <- "neurite"
```

```{r message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=8}
my_comparisons <- list(c("extension", "retraction"))

library(colorspace)

df_summary_NeuriteKymo %>% 
ggplot(aes(x=direction, y=mean, fill = direction)) +
  #geom_point()
  theme_classic()+
  geom_violin(trim=FALSE, kernel ="gaussian", adjust=1)+
  geom_boxplot(width=0.2, fill="white",color="black",alpha=1, outliers = F) +
  geom_jitter(alpha=1, width=0.05) + 
 # scale_color_continuous_sequential(palette = "Heat", begin = 0.3, end = 1)+ 
 scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), 
                    #limits = c(0, 100), 
                    breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 5))+ 
 stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons, test = "t.test", paired=F)+
  theme_ipsum(grid = F, ticks = T) +
 theme_linedraw()+
   theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
        plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "right",
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold")) #for centering the text 

#plotly::ggplotly(p)
```

```{r}
colnames(df_summary_AxonKymo)[[1]] <- "Cell"

df_summary_AllKymo <- rbind(df_summary_AxonKymo, df_summary_NeuriteKymo)
df_summary_AllKymo$group <- paste(df_summary_AllKymo$axon_neurite, df_summary_AllKymo$direction, sep = "_")
```

```{r message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=8}
my_comparisons <- list(c("axon_extension", "axon_retraction"), c("neurite_extension", "neurite_retraction"), c("axon_extension", "neurite_extension"), c("axon_retraction", "neurite_retraction"))

library(colorspace)

df_summary_AllKymo %>% 
ggplot(aes(x=group, y=mean, fill = direction)) +
  #geom_point()
  theme_classic()+
  geom_violin(trim=FALSE, kernel ="gaussian", adjust=1)+
  geom_boxplot(width=0.2, fill="white",color="black",alpha=1, outliers = F) +
  geom_jitter(alpha=1, width=0.05) + 
 # scale_color_continuous_sequential(palette = "Heat", begin = 0.3, end = 1)+ 
 scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), 
                    limits = c(0, 2.5), 
                    breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 5))+ 
 stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons, test = "t.test", paired=F)+
  theme_ipsum(grid = F, ticks = T) +
 theme_linedraw()+
   theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
        plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "right",
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold")) #for centering the text 

#plotly::ggplotly(p)
```

```{r}
ggsave(
  "axon_neurite_rate.pdf",
  plot = last_plot(),
  device = "pdf")
#dev.off()
```
